title: Array Technologies Gross Margin Expansion Analysis 2024-2025
text: Array Technologies gross margin expanded significantly in 2024: Q3 2024 achieved adjusted gross margin of 35.4%, representing 940 basis point improvement from previous year. For full year 2024, company guided to approximately 34% adjusted gross margin. Picture became more complex in 2025: Q2 2025 reported adjusted gross margin of 27.8%. For full year 2025, adjusted gross margin was 27.0%, representing significant decline from 2024 levels. Adjusted gross and EBITDA margins declined versus 2024, largely because sizable 45X amortization benefit that lifted prior-year results rolled off. Management cited about 80 basis points of pressure from tariffs and pricing. 2026 guidance: Adjusted gross margin guidance between 26% and 27%, implying flat underlying margins once prior tax benefits normalized. Despite margin challenges, Array closed 2025 with nearly $1.3 billion in revenue, robust 40% increase from prior year, with 35% rise in tracker volumes signaling market share gains.
